title: cynanchum nummulariifolium var. biflorum
intro: Cynanchum nummulariifolium var. biflorum, also known as the money-leaved milkweed vine, is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family. It is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help to soothe and relieve pain and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
